text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The crowd is going absolutely wild today! Clearly
they're ready to see what will unfold on the stage
of the Japanese Oaks this year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Male Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Even I'm starting to feel nervous! Break a
leg, Mejiro Dober!

text_block_list.name: Female Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I really hope Dober can run at her very best
today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Stop fussing over me so much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: To be honest, yeah. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's not so bad if I pretend I'm just shaking with
excitement.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretending it's excitement. It feels more
reassuring that way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer... You believe in me, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you believe in me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Do you still believe in my running and my
strength?
choice_data_list: You're the strongest racer in the world.
You're the strongest racer in the world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Do you still believe in my running and my
strength?
choice_data_list: You're the strongest racer in the world.
You're the strongest racer in the world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's ridiculous! Why do you always say such
baseless things?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You always exaggerate so much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Still...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Still...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'll accept your silly exaggeration at face
value for today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Your words make me feel a lot more confident
today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm off.
